Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Being shown around kinda makes me feel more motivated to make use of those places.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 1}, did you get all that? Anything you're still unclear about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Good to hear. I hope your stay here is an enjoyable one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Don't concern yourself with the details too much. Just go ahead and use the facilities as you please.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}As long as all of us remain considerate, the dorm will continue to be a comfortable living space for all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If there's anything you'd like to do here, you may want to invite the others to join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Yeah, we're all livin' under the same roof, after all. Better make the most of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I've never really done anything like this before, so I'm a little nervous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I'll try my best to enjoy myself here with you all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}This may be coming a little late for most of you, but welcome to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
